name: tpt-code-command-center
description: Local AI token optimization proxy — intercepts, redacts, caches, and routes LLM traffic from Cline, Claude Code, and any OpenAI-compatible client.

tpt.enabled.description: Master switch — enable or disable the entire TPT proxy pipeline.

enumDescriptions: OpenRouter — unified API with access to 100+ models including DeepSeek and Qwen
Anthropic — direct access to Claude models
OpenAI — direct access to GPT models
Qwen — Alibaba Cloud DashScope compatible endpoint
Local — Ollama, LM Studio, or any local OpenAI-compatible server
Custom — arbitrary base URL and API key
tpt.upstreamProvider.description: Default upstream provider for all LLM requests.

tpt.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key for direct routing.

tpt.openaiApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for direct routing.

tpt.qwenApiKey.description: Qwen API key — Alibaba Cloud DashScope key.

tpt.localBaseUrl.description: Base URL for local model server (Ollama, LM Studio, etc).

tpt.vault.enabled.description: TPT Vault — redact secrets and PII before sending to any LLM.

tpt.vault.customRegex.description: Additional regex patterns to redact (e.g. internal API key formats).

tpt.smartContext.enabled.description: TPT Smart Context — replace full file content with AST outlines in tool calls.

tpt.smartContext.maxFileSize.description: Max file size in bytes to process with Smart Context (default 500KB).

tpt.tokenShield.enabled.description: TPT Token Shield — cache identical prompts locally to skip upstream calls.

tpt.tokenShield.maxCacheSizeMB.description: Maximum size of the local prompt cache in MB.

tpt.memoryWeaver.enabled.description: TPT Memory Weaver — summarise conversation history when it exceeds the token threshold.

tpt.memoryWeaver.tokenThreshold.description: Token count in the messages array that triggers summarisation.

tpt.memoryWeaver.fallbackOrder.description: Order of summarisation backends to try. 'ollama' = local Ollama, 'proxy' = route through configured LLM, 'extractive' = drop oldest messages.

tpt.memoryWeaver.anthropicSummaryModel.description: Model used by Memory Weaver when the upstream provider is Anthropic. Update this string when the model is deprecated — no code change needed.

tpt.memoryWeaver.openaiSummaryModel.description: Model used by Memory Weaver when the upstream provider is OpenAI-compatible (OpenRouter, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Grok, etc.). Update when deprecated.

tpt.memoryWeaver.ollamaModel.description: Ollama model used for local summarisation. The model must be pulled first (e.g. 'ollama pull llama3').

tpt.router.enabled.description: TPT Router — rewrite model and provider based on heuristic rules.

tpt.router.rules.description: Routing rules evaluated in order when the router is enabled. Each rule: { match: { maxTokens?, keywords?, extensions? }, model: string, provider: string }. Edit model/provider values here to update routing targets without any code change.

tpt.silentEdit.enabled.description: TPT Silent Edit — intercept AI JSON edit instructions and apply as native VS Code diffs.

tpt.forge.autoUpdate.description: TPT Forge — automatically check for updated community configs from GitHub.

tpt.forge.registryUrl.description: TPT Forge — custom registry URL. Leave empty to use the default community registry. Must point to a raw JSON file with { entries: ForgeEntry[] } shape.

tpt.terminal.verboseLogging.description: TPT Terminal — show detailed per-request pipeline logs in the Output Channel.

tpt.costBudget.dailyLimitUsd.description: Daily spend limit in USD. A warning notification is shown when today's cost exceeds this value. Set to 0 to disable.

commands.title: TPT: Copy Proxy URL to Clipboard

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run download-wasm && npm run compile
